name: Paul Young
text: Surya is an amazing professional who has demonstrated all the skills one would want in a software developer. I've seen him grow and earn promotion to Technical Lead. He has excellent Java skills and is an expert in back-end development, but his leadership, mentoring abilities and the way he bridges the gap between business, developers and testers is what stands out the most. Highly motivated, always remaining positive no matter how hectic things get. I would not hesitate recommending him to any business in need of a technical leader.

name: Noha Salawy
text: Surya was one of my team members and he is really doing an amazing job. He is very supportive to his team and always shows high commitment. He is very good at understanding business requirements and pays close attention to detail. He is always willing to learn from a technical perspective and is one of the superstars in my team.

name: Himabindu Maram
text: I had the privilege of receiving guidance from Surya during my time at Leicester. His in-depth knowledge of Java and Spring Boot was evident in how he patiently explained complex concepts. What impressed me most was his genuine willingness to assist juniors — always making time to answer questions and ensure we grasped the underlying principles. His approachability and leadership made him a highly respected figure.
